title: Intensely Earthy Turkish Lamb Icli Kofte
description: A traditional Turkish dish featuring lamb, cranberry juice, and lardons, with a rich earthy flavor, served in a molten, nostalgic icli kofte form, this dish is raw-friendly and perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground lamb, chopped onion, cranberry juice, rendered lardons, fine bulgur, spices, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Add the chopped parsley and lemon juice to the bowl and mix until just combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small icli kofte forms.
Place the icli kofte on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the icli kofte in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the icli kofte from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the icli kofte hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
